---
title: "Gribouille"
subtitle: "A layered grammar of graphics for Typst."
toc: false
sidebar: false
image: /assets/typst-render/examples/penguins-light.svg
engine: markdown
include-in-header:
  - text: |
      <style>
        header#title-block-header {
          display: none;
        }
      </style>
---

::: {.hero}

::: {.hero-content}

## {{< brand logo medium >}}

### A layered grammar of graphics for [Typst]{.ink}.

Compose charts by layering data, aesthetic mappings, geoms, scales, and themes.
The same grammar as [`ggplot2`](https://ggplot2.tidyverse.org) and [`plotnine`](https://plotnine.org), drawn natively in Typst.

[Get started](get-started/index.qmd){.btn .btn-primary .btn-lg}
[View on GitHub](https://github.com/mcanouil/gribouille){.btn .btn-outline .btn-lg}
:::

::: {.showcase-output}

```{typst}
//| output-filename: "/assets/typst-render/index/penguins.svg"
//| alt: "To be Updated"
#set page(foreground: context {
  let bg = page.fill
  let dark-bg = if bg == auto or bg == none {
    false
  } else if type(bg) == color {
    luma(bg).components().at(0) < 50%
  } else {
    false
  }
  place(
    top + right,
    dx: -0.25cm,
    dy: 0.25cm,
    image(
      if dark-bg {
        "/docs/assets/images/logo-stacked-dark.svg"
      } else {
        "/docs/assets/images/logo-stacked.svg"
      },
      height: 1.5cm,
    ),
  )
})

#let species_card(name, colour, note) = block(
  width: auto,
  inset: 0pt,
  radius: 4pt,
  fill: luma(99%),
  stroke: (paint: colour, thickness: 0.6pt),
)[
  #set block(spacing: 0pt)

  #block(
    inset: 2pt,
    radius: 4pt,
    fill: colour,
  )[
    #set text(size: 6pt, weight: "bold", fill: white)
    #set par(spacing: 0pt, leading: 0.85em)
    #name
  ]
  #block(inset: (x: 4pt, y: 3pt))[
    #set text(size: 5.4pt, fill: rgb("#111827"))
    #note
  ]
]

#plot(
  data: penguins,
  mapping: aes(
    x: "flipper-len",
    y: "body-mass",
    colour: "species",
    fill: "species",
    shape: "species",
  ),
  layers: (
    geom-point(size: 2pt, alpha: 0.25, stroke: 0.5pt, colour: rgb("#ffffff")),
    // geom-smooth(method: "lm", se: true, alpha: 0.2),
    // geom-ellipse(stat: stat-ellipse(level: 0.95), alpha: 0.1),
    geom-mark(method: "hull", expand: 5pt, alpha: 0.25),
    geom-errorbar(stat: stat-summary(fun: "mean-sd"), width: 5pt),
    geom-errorbarh(stat: stat-summary(fun: "mean-sd"), height: 5pt),
    geom-typst(
      data: (
        (
          x: 183,
          y: 5000,
          species: "Adelie",
          label: [
            #species_card(
              "Adelie",
              rgb("#ff8c00"),
              "Compact and stable mass profile.",
            )
          ],
        ),
        (
          x: 211,
          y: 2900,
          species: "Chinstrap",
          label: [
            #species_card(
              "Chinstrap",
              rgb("#008B8B"),
              "Similar centre to Adelie, with tighter spread.",
            )
          ],
        ),
        (
          x: 203,
          y: 6150,
          species: "Gentoo",
          label: [
            #species_card(
              "Gentoo",
              rgb("#800080"),
              "Heavier birds and broader variability.",
            )
          ],
        ),
      ),
      mapping: aes(
        x: "x",
        y: "y",
        label: "label",
      ),
      inherit-aes: false,
    ),
  ),
  scales: (
    scale-x-continuous(),
    scale-y-continuous(labels: label-comma()),
    scale-colour-discrete(
      limits: ("Adelie", "Chinstrap", "Gentoo"),
      palette: (
        rgb("#ff8c00"),
        rgb("#008B8B"),
        rgb("#800080"),
      ),
    ),
    scale-fill-discrete(
      limits: ("Adelie", "Chinstrap", "Gentoo"),
      palette: (
        rgb("#ff8c00"),
        rgb("#008B8B"),
        rgb("#800080"),
      ),
    ),
  ),
  labs: labs(
    title: typst("Penguins *Dataset*"),
    subtitle: typst([
      Flipper length vs body mass by species:
      #text(fill: rgb("#ff8c00"), weight: "bold")[Adelie],
      #text(fill: rgb("#008B8B"), weight: "bold")[Chinstrap],
      #text(fill: rgb("#800080"), weight: "bold")[Gentoo]
    ]),
    caption: "Data from Palmer Archipelago (Antarctica) penguin dataset.",
    colour: "Species",
    fill: "Species",
    shape: "Species",
    x: "Flipper Length (mm)",
    y: "Body Mass (g)",
  ),
  theme: theme-minimal(
    axis-line: element-line(thickness: 0.5pt),
    tick-length: 0.05cm,
  ),
  guides: guides(
    colour: guide-none(),
    fill: guide-none(),
    shape: guide-none(),
  ),
  width: 12cm,
  height: 9cm,
)
```

:::

:::

::: {.steps}
::: {.step}

### 1. Data. {.no-anchor}

Bring a CSV, a list of dictionaries, or an inline table.
:::

::: {.step}

### 2. Mapping. {.no-anchor}

Declare which column drives `x`, `y`, `colour`, `fill`, or `size`.
:::

::: {.step}

### 3. Layers. {.no-anchor}

Stack geoms, scales, facets, and a theme until the plot is right.
:::
:::

## See it in action

::: {.showcase}

::: {.showcase-code}

```typst
#import "@preview/gribouille:{{< env VERSION >}}": *

#let df = csv("penguins.csv", row-type: dictionary)

#plot(
  data: df,
  mapping: aes(
    x: "flipper-len",
    y: "body-mass",
    fill: "species",
  ),
  layers: (
    geom-point(size: 2pt),
    geom-smooth(method: "lm"),
  ),
  facet: facet-wrap("island"),
  theme: theme-minimal(),
)
```

:::

::: {.showcase-output}

```{typst}
//| output-filename: "/assets/typst-render/index/showcase.svg"
//| alt: "To be Updated"
#include "/examples/showcase.typ"
```

:::

:::

## What is in the box

::: {.feature-grid}

::: {.feature}

#### [Geoms.](reference/geoms/index.qmd) {.no-anchor}

Points, lines, bars, histograms, smoothers, ribbons, boxplots, text, labels, and reference lines.
:::

::: {.feature}

#### [Scales.](reference/scales/index.qmd) {.no-anchor}

Continuous and discrete x, y, colour, fill, size, shape, linetype, with Viridis and manual palettes.
:::

::: {.feature}

#### [Positions and stats.](reference/index.qmd) {.no-anchor}

Identity, stack, dodge, and fill positions.
Bin, count, identity, and smooth stats.
:::

::: {.feature}

#### [Facets.](reference/facets/index.qmd) {.no-anchor}

`facet-wrap` and `facet-grid` with shared or free scales.
:::

::: {.feature}

#### [Themes.](reference/themes/index.qmd) {.no-anchor}

`theme-minimal`, `theme-classic`, `theme-void`, plus `theme()` element overrides.
:::

::: {.feature}

#### [Composable.](examples/index.qmd) {.no-anchor}

Everything is data you can `let`, extend, and reuse across a Typst document.
:::

:::

## A few examples

::: {.light-content}

::: {.gallery-preview}
[![Minimal scatter](/assets/typst-render/examples/minimal-light.svg)](examples/index.qmd)
[![Multilayer trend](/assets/typst-render/examples/multilayer-light.svg)](examples/index.qmd)
[![Smoother with ribbon](/assets/typst-render/examples/smooth-light.svg)](examples/index.qmd)
[![Facets](/assets/typst-render/examples/facets-light.svg)](examples/index.qmd)
:::

:::

::: {.dark-content}

::: {.gallery-preview}
[![Minimal scatter](/assets/typst-render/examples/minimal-dark.svg)](examples/index.qmd)
[![Multilayer trend](/assets/typst-render/examples/multilayer-dark.svg)](examples/index.qmd)
[![Smoother with ribbon](/assets/typst-render/examples/smooth-dark.svg)](examples/index.qmd)
[![Facets](/assets/typst-render/examples/facets-dark.svg)](examples/index.qmd)
:::

:::

[See all examples](examples/index.qmd){.btn .btn-outline}

::: {.install-band}

## Install.

```typst
#import "@preview/gribouille:{{< env VERSION >}}": *
```

[Read the getting-started guide](get-started/index.qmd){.btn .btn-primary}
:::

::: {.fine-print}

_Gribouille_ requires [Typst](https://typst.app) {{< var typst.series >}} or later and [CeTZ](https://typst.app/universe/package/cetz) {{< var dependencies.cetz.series >}} as the drawing backend.
Released under the [MIT Licence](https://github.com/mcanouil/gribouille?tab=MIT-1-ov-file#readme).

:::
